case.description: Track the work needed to publish CAPHTECH/higher-graphen safely as a public repository. The case covers publication boundary decisions, release artifact preparation, verification, explicit approval, GitHub visibility change, and post-public checks.
case.title: Public repository release

node.description: Done when CAPHTECH/higher-graphen is public on GitHub, the intended public branch is pushed, the license and commercial boundary are documented, .casegraphen is intentionally public with runtime/private artifacts excluded, verification evidence is attached, and post-public access checks pass. Out of scope: publishing proprietary interpretation packages, customer data, hosted service infrastructure, or private commercial strategy.
node.title: Publish HigherGraphen repository publicly

node.description: Inventory tracked, modified, and untracked files before publication. Confirm which .casegraphen cases, docs, schemas, examples, skills, tools, and runtime files are public artifacts; identify anything that must be excluded, moved, ignored, rewritten, or intentionally included. Proof before done: git status, git ls-files, targeted secret scan, and a summary of public/private disposition are attached as evidence.
node.title: Audit publication surface

node.description: Choose the release model that constrains all publication work: which license applies to the public core, whether any parts are source-available or commercial-only, how public CaseGraphen traces are governed, and where proprietary interpretation packages will live. Record the chosen option with rationale before preparing final release artifacts.
node.title: Select public license and commercial boundary

node.description: Apply the selected publication model to the repository. Add or update LICENSE, commercial boundary notes, README/publication guidance, .gitignore rules, public examples, and any release-facing docs needed before first push. Proof before done: changed paths are listed, docs links are checked, runtime/private files are not staged, and the artifacts match the recorded publication decision.
node.title: Prepare public release artifacts

node.description: Run the checks that prove the repository is ready to publish. Minimum proof: git diff --check, cg validate storage, relevant cg case validation for publication cases, targeted secret scan, cargo/test/static checks appropriate to the staged code, and confirmation that the GitHub remote state is understood. Do not mark done while unrelated dirty work makes the release surface ambiguous.
node.title: Verify release candidate

node.description: External milestone: after the release candidate is verified, the repository owner explicitly approves pushing the intended branch and changing CAPHTECH/higher-graphen from private to public.
node.title: User approves public publication

node.description: After verification and explicit approval, push the intended branch to origin, change GitHub visibility to public, and verify public access. Proof before done: git push result, GitHub visibility check showing PUBLIC, fresh access check or clone/read check, and any post-public remediation notes.
node.title: Publish and verify public repository

metadata.last_wait_reason: Waiting for explicit owner approval after release-candidate verification before pushing and making CAPHTECH/higher-graphen public.

node.description: Created hg_public_repository_release to drive public publication through CaseGraphen. Baseline observed on 2026-04-26 JST: HEAD is d21d6fc, GitHub repository CAPHTECH/higher-graphen exists and is PRIVATE, origin is configured, and the current worktree contains unrelated modified/untracked feed, casegraphen workflow, runtime, schema, and documentation work that must be audited before publication. The current frontier is task_audit_publication_surface only; publication is gated by event_user_approval_to_publish after release-candidate verification.
node.title: Public release case initialized

node.description: Audit commands run: git status --short; git ls-files; git ls-files .casegraphen; git status --short .casegraphen; git ls-files --others --exclude-standard; git status --short --ignored .casegraphen target; git log --oneline -- .casegraphen; git branch -vv; git remote -v; gh repo view CAPHTECH/higher-graphen --json nameWithOwner,visibility,url; targeted rg secret scan excluding .git and target; find . -maxdepth 2 -iname license* -o -iname copying*. Findings: GitHub repo exists at CAPHTECH/higher-graphen and is PRIVATE; current branch is main at d21d6fc; origin points to https://github.com/CAPHTECH/higher-graphen.git. No secret pattern matched. No LICENSE/COPYING file exists. .casegraphen is intentionally public and already has tracked history; .casegraphen/.lock, .casegraphen/cache, and target are ignored. Current release surface is ambiguous because there are modified tracked files for feed/runtime/schema/docs/CLI/casegraphen tests plus untracked feed product artifacts, workflow schemas, feed schemas/reports/examples, and open .casegraphen cases. Disposition for next decision: tracked core/docs/schemas/tools and public CaseGraphen traces are publishable in principle; runtime/private artifacts remain excluded; the release model must decide license and whether the current feed/workflow untracked work is in the initial public release or deferred.
node.title: Publication surface audit completed

metadata.decision_result: Initial public release model: publish the HigherGraphen repository as an open-source core under Apache License 2.0; keep proprietary/commercial work outside this repository. Public content includes the higher-structure core crates, baseline intermediate tools including casegraphen, schemas, docs, public examples, repo-owned skills, provider-neutral CLI skill bundle, and intentional public .casegraphen development traces. Private or commercial-only content includes customer-specific data, private engagement records, hosted service infrastructure, production-grade proprietary interpretation packages, private evaluation datasets, commercial pricing/sales strategy, secrets, and local runtime artifacts. Rationale: permissive OSS maximizes category formation and agent/tool adoption while monetization remains in interpretation packages, hosted execution, enterprise integration, and private customer-specific assets. Rejected for the initial public repo: fully private repository, because it slows category formation; BSL/source-available for the current core, because it creates adoption friction before the public standard is established; publishing everything, because commercial packages and customer/private material need a separate boundary.

node.description: Prepared release-facing artifacts for the selected Apache-2.0 open-core boundary. Added LICENSE with Apache License 2.0 text and COMMERCIAL_BOUNDARY.md defining public repository contents versus private/commercial material. Updated README.md with License And Commercial Boundary section and documentation link. Added workspace package license = Apache-2.0 in Cargo.toml and added license.workspace = true to each tracked package manifest under crates/, tools/, and examples/architecture; examples/feed/Cargo.toml also inherits the license as part of the current untracked feed work. Checks run: git diff --check passed; cargo metadata --no-deps --format-version 1 parsed successfully and reported Apache-2.0 for all current workspace packages; targeted secret scan returned no matches; cg validate storage returned VALID; git diff --cached --name-only was empty, so no runtime/private artifacts are staged. Existing unrelated modified/untracked feed and workflow work remains in the working tree and must be addressed by the release-candidate verification task before publication.
node.title: Public release artifacts prepared

node.description: Create the exact commit set that will be pushed publicly. Decide whether the current feed/workflow changes are included in the initial public release or deferred, stage only intended public files, commit them in coherent commits, and leave runtime/private artifacts ignored. Proof before done: git status shows only intentionally deferred work or is clean, git show/stat identifies the release commits, and the committed tree contains LICENSE, COMMERCIAL_BOUNDARY.md, public CaseGraphen release case, and any selected feed/workflow artifacts.
node.title: Finalize public commit set

node.description: Ran release-candidate checks against the current working tree before the public commit set was finalized. Passing checks: git diff --check; cg validate storage; cg validate --case hg_public_repository_release --format json; targeted secret scan excluding .git and target; gh repo view confirmed CAPHTECH/higher-graphen is still PRIVATE; cargo fmt --all --check; cargo metadata license check showing Apache-2.0 for all current workspace packages; cargo test --workspace; sh scripts/static-analysis.sh. Additional scan for customer/private/commercial keywords found expected boundary-policy text plus public fixture/spec language, not private customer data. This task is not done because the exact public commit set is not finalized; added task_finalize_public_commit_set as a new prerequisite.
node.title: Verification checkpoint before commit-set finalization

node.description: Created local release candidate commit a5633f7: Prepare HigherGraphen public release candidate. The commit includes LICENSE, COMMERCIAL_BOUNDARY.md, README release guidance, Cargo license metadata, public .casegraphen release/feed/workflow cases, feed product/runtime/example artifacts, CaseGraphen workflow schemas/model/docs, and current CLI/schema/docs updates. git status was clean after the commit except ignored .casegraphen/.lock, .casegraphen/cache, and target. This is the intended public branch content before final verification and owner approval.
node.title: Public commit set finalized

node.description: Verified local public release candidate after commit set finalization. Current commit stack: d8b69a1 Record public release commit set, a5633f7 Prepare HigherGraphen public release candidate, d21d6fc Document public CaseGraphen workspace policy, 6568394 Document HigherGraphen AI operator paradigm. Final lightweight checks after d8b69a1: git status --short was clean; git diff --check passed; cg validate storage returned VALID; cg validate --case hg_public_repository_release --format json returned valid true with no warnings; gh repo view confirmed CAPHTECH/higher-graphen is still PRIVATE. Prior full checks before committing the case proof also passed: cargo fmt --all --check, cargo metadata license check with Apache-2.0 for all workspace packages, cargo test --workspace, sh scripts/static-analysis.sh, targeted secret scan, and private/commercial keyword scan with only expected policy/spec mentions. Remaining blocker is external: event_user_approval_to_publish before push and GitHub public visibility change.
node.title: Release candidate verified
